chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 1034 of 2022 a/w C.P. No. S- 186 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 3738/2022 3.For hearing of main case 17-01-2023 Petitioners are present in person. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State along with SIO/SIP Liaquat Ali, P.S, Lakhi Ghulam Shah ad Inspector Sikandar Ali on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. ***** Petitioners are present in person. SIP-Liaquat Ali Napar, SHO & I.O Lakhi Ghula Shah (respondent No.3) is present and files compliance report, which reflects that during course of investigation, he recorded statement of petitioner No.1 and disposed of the case under C-class of the Police Rules; copy of such final report along with copy of order dated 05.01.2023, passed by Judicial Magistrate, Lakhi Ghulam Shah is annexed with the compliance report, which reflects that FIR No. 75 of 2022 registered at P.S, Lakhi under Section 365-B PPC has been disposed of under C–class. The petitioners present in Court on being satisfied do not press the captioned petitions further, which stand disposed of along with listed application(s). Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
